The SIM stores your account information and connects your device to the T‑Mobile network. Your phone may have two options for SIM cards, a digital eSIM or a Physical SIM card. Key features

416 x 496 pixels

Always‑On Retina display with wide‑angle OLEDs and LTPO3

Talk Time

3 Days Standby Time

Other features

  • Hypertension Notifications ¹
  • Know your sleep score
  • Even more health insights⁶,⁷,⁸,⁹
  • Stunning Design
  • A Powerful Fitness Partner⁴,¹⁰
  • Big Boost in Battery Life³,¹¹
  • Built to Last¹²,¹³
  • Safety Features¹⁴
  • Stay Connected
Apple Watch Series 11 brings you invaluable health insights including hypertension notifications1 and sleep score. Boost your fitness with advanced metrics and Workout Buddy powered by Apple Intelligence from your nearby iPhone.4 Get up to 24 hours of battery life.3 And now with speedy 5G, you can get fast performance on the go.2

Be sure to explore the stunning new Apple Watch SE 3 40mm, Apple Watch SE 3 44mm , Apple Watch Series 11 46mm and Apple Watch Ultra 3 , available on the nation’s largest and fastest nationwide 5G network.

Apple Watch Series 11 42mm Quick Facts
  • When was the Apple Watch Series 11 42mm released? The Apple Watch 11 42mm was released on September 19th, 2025.
  • What colors are available on the Apple Watch 11 42mm? The Apple Watch Series 11 42mm is available in three polished titanium colors: Natural Titanium, Gold Titanium and Slate Titanium, and four aluminum colors: Space Gray Aluminum, Jet Black Aluminum, Rose Gold Aluminum, and Silver Aluminum. They can be customized with colorful watch bands.
*Color and memory size options may vary in availability online or in store.

1Hypertension notifications are not intended for use by people under 22 years old, those who have been previously diagnosed with hypertension, or pregnant persons.
2Data plan required. 5G is available in select markets and through select carriers. Speeds vary based on site conditions and carrier. For details on 5G support, contact your carrier and see apple.com/watch/cellular.
3Battery life varies by use and configuration. See apple.com/watch/battery for more information.
4Requires an Apple Intelligence–enabled iPhone nearby and Bluetooth headphones with device and Siri language set to English. Apple Intelligence is available in beta. Some features may not be available in all regions or languages. For feature and language availability and system requirements, see support.apple.com/en-us/121115.
5The ECG app is available on Apple Watch Series 4 and later (excluding Apple Watch SE models) and can generate an ECG similar to a single-lead electrocardiogram. Intended for use by people 22 years old or older.
6Irregular rhythm notification requires the latest versions of watchOS and iOS. It is not intended for use by people under 22 years old or those who have been previously diagnosed with atrial fibrillation (AFib).
7Sleep apnea notifications are available on Apple Watch Series 9 and later, Ultra 2 and later, and SE 3. The feature is intended to detect signs of moderate to severe sleep apnea for people 18 years old or older without a diagnosis of sleep apnea.
8The Vitals app is for wellness purposes only and not for medical use.
9The Blood Oxygen app is for wellness purposes only and not for medical use. Measurements are calculated and viewed on iPhone in the Health app.
10Apple Fitness+ requires a subscription.
11Fast charging is compatible with Apple Watch Series 7 and later, any Apple Watch Ultra model, and Apple Watch SE 3.
12Apple Watch Series 11 is 2x more scratch resistant compared to earlier models.
13Apple Watch Series 11 has a water resistance rating of 50 meters under ISO standard 22810:2010. This means that it may be used for shallow-water activities like swimming in a pool or ocean. Apple Watch Series 11 should not be used for scuba diving, waterskiing, or other activities involving high-velocity water or submersion below shallow depth. Water resistance is not a permanent condition and can diminish over time. For additional information, see support.apple.com/en-us/109522. Apple Watch Series 11 is rated IP6X dust resistant.
14Emergency SOS requires a cellular connection or Wi-Fi calling with an internet connection from your Apple Watch or nearby iPhone. You can use cellular models of Apple Watch to make an emergency call in many locations, provided that cellular service is available. Some cellular networks may not accept an emergency call from your Apple Watch if your Apple Watch isn’t activated, if it isn’t compatible with or configured to operate on a particular cellular network, if isn’t set up for cellular service, or if the cellular network does not support emergency calling over IMS. See support.apple.com/108374 and apple.com/watch/cellular for more information.
15Wireless service plan required for cellular service. Contact your service provider for more details. Connection may vary based on network availability. Check apple.com/watch/cellular for participating wireless carriers and eligibility. See support.apple.com/HT207578 for additional setup instructions

What’s in the box

  • Apple Watch Series 11 46mm
  • Band
  • Apple Watch Magnetic Fast Charger to USB-C Cable (1m)

  • When was the Apple Watch Series 11 42mm released? The Apple Watch 11 42mm was released on September 19th, 2025.
  • What colors are available on the Apple Watch 11 42mm? The Apple Watch Series 11 42mm is available in three polished titanium colors: Natural Titanium, Gold Titanium and Slate Titanium, and four aluminum colors: Space Gray Aluminum, Jet Black Aluminum, Rose Gold Aluminum, and Silver Aluminum. They can be customized with colorful watch bands.

1Hypertension notifications are not intended for use by people under 22 years old, those who have been previously diagnosed with hypertension, or pregnant persons.

Some features may not be available in all regions or languages. For feature and language availability and system requirements, see support.apple.com/en-us/121115.
5The ECG app is available on Apple Watch Series 4 and later (excluding Apple Watch SE models) and can generate an ECG similar to a single-lead electrocardiogram. Intended for use by people 22 years old or older.
6Irregular rhythm notification requires the latest versions of watchOS and iOS. It is not intended for use by people under 22 years old or those who have been previously diagnosed with atrial fibrillation (AFib).
7Sleep apnea notifications are available on Apple Watch Series 9 and later, Ultra 2 and later, and SE 3. The feature is intended to detect signs of moderate to severe sleep apnea for people 18 years old or older without a diagnosis of sleep apnea.
8The Vitals app is for wellness purposes only and not for medical use.
9The Blood Oxygen app is for wellness purposes only and not for medical use. Measurements are calculated and viewed on iPhone in the Health app.
10Apple Fitness+ requires a subscription.
11Fast charging is compatible with Apple Watch Series 7 and later, any Apple Watch Ultra model, and Apple Watch SE 3.
12Apple Watch Series 11 is 2x more scratch resistant compared to earlier models.
13Apple Watch Series 11 has a water resistance rating of 50 meters under ISO standard 22810:2010. This means that it may be used for shallow-water activities like swimming in a pool or ocean. Apple Watch Series 11 should not be used for scuba diving, waterskiing, or other activities involving high-velocity water or submersion below shallow depth. Water resistance is not a permanent condition and can diminish over time. For additional information, see support.apple.com/en-us/109522. Apple Watch Series 11 is rated IP6X dust resistant.
14Emergency SOS requires a cellular connection or Wi-Fi calling with an internet connection from your Apple Watch or nearby iPhone. You can use cellular models of Apple Watch to make an emergency call in many locations, provided that cellular service is available. Some cellular networks may not accept an emergency call from your Apple Watch if your Apple Watch isn’t activated, if it isn’t compatible with or configured to operate on a particular cellular network, if isn’t set up for cellular service, or if the cellular network does not support emergency calling over IMS. See support.apple.com/108374 and apple.com/watch/cellular for more information.
15Wireless service plan required for cellular service. Contact your service provider for more details. Connection may vary based on network availability. Check apple.com/watch/cellular for participating wireless carriers and eligibility. See support.apple.com/HT207578 for additional setup instructions

Does this device meet the following conditions?

  • The device stays powered on
  • The screen on my device is free of cracks (Scratches and scuffs are acceptable)
  • The device has no liquid or moisture damage
  • Find My Device must be turned off
  • The device stays powered on
  • The screen on my device is free of cracks (Scratches and scuffs are acceptable
  • The device has no liquid or moisture damage
Learn more about qualifying conditions , opens in a new window

If you select “No,” your trade-in device may still qualify for great deals.

Limited-time offer. Trade-in qualifying device for one-time credit towards existing Equipment Installment Plan balance or customer bill; may take several billing cycles to receive credit. Trade-ins are final. Trade-in amount may be adjusted based on evaluation of device condition on receipt. See full details

Trade in your eligible device and we'll use the trade-in value to pay down your Equipment Installment Plan balance. If the trade-in value of your device exceeds your Equipment Installment Plan balance, the difference will be credited to your bill in 2-3 bill cycles after trade-in device receipt.  

If your IMEI does not match, or your device does not display contact Customer Care (1-800-937-8997). Note that sending in an incorrect device will be considered a trade-in under the Device Recovery Program (it will not qualify as your JUMP! trade-in) and the device will not be returned to you.

Note: To use Yearly Upgrade, your eligible trade-in device needs to be the phone listed above. Trade in your eligible phone and we'll use the trade-in value to pay down your current balance and enroll you into active promotions that your trade is eligible for.  

If your Phone or IMEI does not match, or if you cannot confirm your IMEI number contact Customer Care (1-800-937-8997). Note that sending in an incorrect device will not be considered as an eligible device for Yearly Upgrade and we will not pay-off your current phone balance. If your ineligible device is traded-in we will still consider you for active in-market promotions or you can choose to receive your device back.

Let’s get your trade-in details

Dial *#06# to get your IMEI, or

Even with damage, you may still save on your trade-in!

What's the condition of your device? Select all that apply:
  • Does not turn on and load the home screen
  • Won't stay on without charger connection
  • Device has had prolonged contact with liquid
  • The Liquid Damage indicator is red, pink, or missing
  • Scratches and scuffs (superficial damage that hasn't caused a crack) are considered a normal part of use and are acceptable. 
Learn more about qualifying conditions

Did you know?

Confirming your IMEI could still qualify you for promotional savings.

Dial *#06# to get your IMEI, or

  1. Go to Settings.
  2. Select About Phone
  3. Select Status.
  4. Scroll to find your IMEI number.
  5. Press and hold to copy IMEI number.
  1. Go to Settings.
  2. Select General.
  3. Select About.
  4. Scroll to find your IMEI number.
  5. Press and hold to copy IMEI number.

Find model and storage size

Model

  1. Go to Settings.
  2. Select General.
  3. Select About.
  4. Look for Model Name.

Storage size

  1. Go to Settings.
  2. Select General.
  3. Select About.
  4. Scroll down to Capacity.

Model

  1. Go to Settings.
  2. Select About Phone.
  3. Look for Model Name.

 

Storage size

  1. Go to Settings.
  2. Select Battery and device care.
  3. Select About.
  4. Scroll down to Storage.

Trading in is as easy with ship kit.

Your ship kit includes everything you need, so don’t worry. But here’s what to expect:

  1. Don’t worry, you won’t be without a phone
    The first thing we’ll do is ship your new device! We’ll also send a trade-in ship kit with prepaid shipping and instructions.

  2. Sit back, relax, and transfer your data
    Transferring your data from the old device to the new one isn’t hard. It just takes a little time. Learn how

  3. Turn off Find My iPhone
    For iPhone users this is necessary to reset your trade-in device or we can’t user it—and you won’t get the value for it. Learn how

  4. You have 30 days to send in your trade-in
    Once we receive your device and verify its condition, we’ll confirm your trade-in is final.

Bring your trade-in to a store location and we’ll handle it.

  1. Want to save time? Do a little prep in advance
    Back up your device and turn off Find My iPhone before you go to the store to save time.  How to back up my device

  2. Come on in to a T-Mobile store near you
    Once your new device has shipped, come to a T-Mobile store within 30 days.

  3. Remember to bring both your devices
    We can help set up your new device and take care of your trade-in.

  4. JUMP! devices cannot be returned in store.
     
  5. Yearly Upgrade devices cannot be returned in store.
     

Visit a store with your new iPhone  and trade-in device.
Find a store near me

There's a problem

Unfortunately, due to the condition of your device, we are unable to accept the device as a trade-in. 

If you want to visit the Assurant claims website, select File a claim below and provide information about your membership and your device. You may be required to pay a deductible.

How does JUMP! work?

JUMP! is part of Protection 360™, which includes upgrade benefits and device protection.

Upgrade: With JUMP!, you can upgrade to a new device once you've paid off 50% of your current device cost.

Device protection: Protection 360™ also provides comprehensive protection against loss, theft, accidental damage, and mechanical breakdown. You have Protection 360™ and an active device installment plan, so you're automatically eligible for JUMP!

Full Terms

Yearly Upgrade: Qualifying service plan required with financed device and trade-in of an eligible device in good working order required. Pay 50% of your device cost to be eligible for upgrades and own your phone for at least 6 months on an active Equipment Installment Plan. Offer may not be available in all locations. Device pricing may vary based on approved credit. 

Available only for qualifying new financed devices purchased on Go5G Next plan; existing devices are not eligible.  Upgrade qualifying device after owning the device for at least 6 months and when 50% of device cost has been paid.  Trade-in device must be in good working order.  You must be current with your scheduled financing and wireless service payments.  Upgrading ends current financing and any device promotion or deposit reimbursement credits and we will pay the remaining balance of your then-existing finance agreement; trade-in satisfies early upgrade and not valued separately.  Not combinable with some offers (e.g. JUMP). Upgrade benefit is subject to cancellation or change. 

Trade-In: Trade-in qualifying device for remaining device balance pay-off. Credit applied to existing Equipment Installment Plan(s) (EIP) balance(s) and enrolled in active eligible promotion in the order determined by T-Mobile and customer eligibility; may take several billing cycles to receive credit. Device recovery transactions are final; after you trade in your device, we may not give you the option to get it back. T-Mobile (we do not know who does this anymore – up to legal) may make adjustments to the Initial Quote or unenroll you in enrolled device promotions based upon evaluation of quality and condition of the device on receipt. You can trade-in one device per active line at the time you upgrade See Device Recovery Program Terms and Conditions for details. Password/Locking Features must be turned off to be an eligible trade. You must reset Your Device to factory settings and remove any passwords or locking features before sending it in; refer to your phone instructions manual or contact your device's Customer Support to disable those features. If you fail to do so, the device will not be eligible for trade-in.

Full Terms

JUMP!: Qualifying service plan with financed device and trade-in of an eligible device in good working order required. Pay 50% of your device cost to be eligible for upgrades. Offer may not be available in all locations. Device pricing may vary based on approved credit. NY residents must use JUMP! benefits prior to completing 2 insurance claims in 12/mos. JUMP! Upgrades from T-Mobile; trade-in benefits through CWork Solutions, LP. Program fees paid to CWork. No separate insurance fees, except in NY.

Device Trade-In: Trade-in qualifying device for credit. Credit applied to existing Equipment Installment Plan(s) (EIP) balance(s) or to customer bill in the order determined by T-Mobile and customer eligibility; may take several billing cycles to receive credit. Device recovery transactions are final; after you trade in your device, you cannot get it back. CWork may make adjustments to the Initial Quote based upon evaluation of quality and condition of the device on receipt. You can trade-in one device per active line at the time you upgrade See Device Recovery Program Terms and Conditions for details. Password/Locking Features. You must reset Your Device to factory settings and remove any passwords or locking features before sending it in; refer to your phone instructions manual or contact your device's Customer Support to disable those features. If you fail to do so, the device will not be eligible for trade-in.

 

JUMP! terms & conditions

JUMP!: Qualifying service plan with financed device and trade-in of an eligible device in good working order required. Pay 50% of your device cost to be eligible for upgrades. Offer may not be available in all locations. Device pricing may vary based on approved credit. JUMP Upgrades from T‑Mobile; trade-in benefits from T‑Mobile.

Why do I need to pay today?

To upgrade to a new device using this promotion, your current device and trade-in must be fully paid off. This includes any remaining balance on your Equipment Installment Plan (EIP).

1Receive credit over 24 months with newPlanName plan and trade-in. .

2Year Price Guarantee: Applies to monthly price for on-network talk, text and 5G data. Exclusions like taxes & fees apply.

3Essentials customers may notice speeds lower than other customers and further reduction if using >50GB/month., due to data prioritization. Video typically streams on smartphone/tablet in SD quality; Experience More, or Experience Beyond plan activate upto 4K UHD streaming on capable device, or video typically streams in SD. Experience Beyond: Qualifying new financed device & on Experience Beyond plan required. Upgrade qualifying device in good condition after 6+ months with 50% paid off ; upgrade ends current financing & promo credits. Not combinable with some offers.

Note: Plan updates are not final until checkout. You may lose your current promotion with this rate plan change.  

Recurring promotional value via 24 monthly bill credits. If you cancel before 24 credits, credits stop and balance on required finance agreement may be due; contact us. For well-qualified customers, plus tax. 

Limited-time offer. Trade-in qualifying device in good condition for credit towards existing Equipment Installment Plan balance or customer bill; may take several billing cycles to receive credit. Trade-ins are final. Trade-in amount may be adjusted based on evaluation of device condition on receipt. See full details at T-mobile.com/devices/phone-trade-in

IMPORTANT NOTICE ABOUT CALLING EMERGENCY SERVICES (911): Before calling 911, customers with a phone number from outside North America should set their T-Mobile phone number as their default number. If you use a non-North American phone number to call 911, the 911 operator won’t receive that phone number and will be unable to call you back if your 911 call is disconnected.

See 

If congested, customers using >50GB/mo. may notice reduced speeds due to prioritization. Video typically streams on smartphone at 480p. Tethering at max 3G speeds.

Full rate plan disclosures

Essentials: Credit approval, deposit, and, in stores & on customer service calls, $35 device connection charge due at sale. Monthly Regulatory Programs (RPF) & Telco Recovery Fee (TRF) totaling $3.49 per voice line ($0.50 for RPF & $2.99 for TRF) and $1.40 per data only line ($0.12 for RPF & $1.28 for TRF) applies; taxes/fees approx. 4-38% of bill. Capable device required for some features. Not combinable with certain offers. Switching plans may cause you to lose current plan/feature benefits; ask a rep for details. Max 6 lines. Plan not available for hotspots and some other data-first devices. Unlimited talk & text features for direct communications between 2 people; others (e.g., conference & chat lines, etc.) may cost extra. Some messages, including those over 1MB, use data and may be unavailable internationally. Roaming: U.S. roaming and on-network data allotments differ: includes 200MB roaming. High-speed data is US only; in Canada/Mexico, unlimited at up to 128kbps; additional purchase required for data elsewhere. Calls from Simple Global countries, including over Wi-Fi, are $.25/minute (no charge for Wi-Fi calls to US, Mexico and Canada). Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. Not for extended international use; you must reside in the U.S. and primary usage must occur on our U.S. network. Device must register on our U.S. network before international use. Video streams at up to 2.5Mbps (SD). Optimization may affect speed of video downloads; does not apply to video uploads. For best performance, leave any video streaming applications at their default automatic resolution setting. Tethering at max 3G speeds. For customers using >50GB/month., primary data usage must be on smartphone or tablet. Smartphone/tablet usage is prioritized over Mobile Hotspot (tethering) usage, which may result in higher speeds for data used on smartphones and tablets. AutoPay discount requires bank account or debit card, up to 6 lines, otherwise $10/month per line. May not be reflected on 1st bill. 

$35 device connection charge due at sale. Credit approval & deposit may be required. U.S. roaming and on-network data allotments differ: includes 200MB roaming. Unlimited talk & text features for direct communications between 2 people; others (e.g., conference & chat lines, etc.) may cost extra. Unlimited high-speed data US only. Not available for hotspots and some other data-first devices. Activation required to deliver video streams at speeds that provide up to *HD video capability (max 720p); some content providers may not stream their services in HD. May affect speed of video downloads; does not apply to video uploads. Netflix: Offer subject to change. Receive Netflix Basic (1-screen, up to $9.99/month. value) while you maintain 2+ qualifying lines in good standing. Alternative discount toward different Netflix streaming plans may apply. Not redeemable or refundable for cash. Cancel Netflix anytime. Netflix Terms of Use apply: www.netflix.com/termsofuse. 1 offer per T‑Mobile account; for existing Netflix members it may take 1-2 bill cycles during which time you will continue to be charged separately for any existing Netflix account. If you link an existing Netflix account to this offer, terminating the qualifying line(s) will not automatically cancel your Netflix membership, and Netflix will automatically resume charging your existing payment method that they have on file. See T‑Mobile.com/netflix for additional info. Like all plans, features may change or be discontinued at any time; see T‑Mobile Terms and Conditions at T‑Mobile.com for details. Tethering: 15GB high-speed data then unlimited on our network at max 3G speeds. For customers using >50GB/month., primary data usage must be on smartphone or tablet. Smartphone usage is prioritized over Mobile Hotspot (tethering) usage, which may result in higher speeds for data used on smartphone. AutoPay discount ** requires bank account or debit card, up to 8 lines, otherwise $10/month per line. May not be reflected on 1st bill. International Roaming in Simple Global Destinations: Calls, including over Wi-Fi, are $.25/minute (no charge for Wi-Fi calls to US, Mexico and Canada). In Canada/Mexico, up to 10GB high-speed data then unlimited at up to 128kbps. Up to 5GB high-speed data in select Central European countries; otherwise, standard speeds approx. 256 Kbps. Video typically streams at up to 2.5 Mbps (SD), where available. Not for extended international use; you must reside in the U.S. and primary usage must occur on our network. Device must register on our network before international use. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. Coverage not available in some areas; we are not responsible for our partners’ networks. 

Experience More: $35 device connection charge due at sale. Credit approval & deposit may be required. U.S. roaming and on-network data allotments differ: includes 200MB roaming. Unlimited talk & text features for direct communications between 2 people; others (e.g., conference & chat lines, etc.) may cost extra. Unlimited high-speed data in US only. Not available for hotspots and some other data-first devices. Capable device required for some features. Activation required to deliver video streams at speeds that provide up to *Ultra HD video capability (max 4K); some content providers may not stream their services in UHD. May affect speed of video downloads; does not apply to video uploads. Apple TV: Offer subject to change. Receive Apple TV discount (up to $9.99/month. value) while you maintain 1 qualifying Experience More line in good standing. Valid only for Apple TV in the United States. Complete registration with Apple in the Apple TV app; requires iTunes/Apple Media Services account. Terms and Apple Privacy Policy apply; see the applicable terms at https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/us/terms.html. Must be 13+. Only one offer per account; may take 1-2 bill cycles. Apple TV is a registered trademark of Apple Inc. Apple is not a sponsor of this promotion. Netflix: Offer subject to change. Receive Netflix Basic (1-screen, up to $9.99/month. value) while you maintain 1 qualifying Experience More line in good standing or Netflix Standard (2-screen within a household, up to $15.49/month. value) while you maintain 2+ qualifying lines in good standing. Alternative discount toward different Netflix streaming plans may apply. Not redeemable or refundable for cash. Cancel Netflix anytime. Netflix Terms of Use apply: www.netflix.com/termsofuse. 1 offer per T‑Mobile account; for existing Netflix members it may take 1-2 bill cycles during which time you will continue to be charged separately for any existing Netflix account. If you link an existing Netflix account to this offer, terminating the qualifying line(s) will not automatically cancel your Netflix membership, and Netflix will automatically resume charging your existing payment method that they have on file. See T‑Mobile.com/netflix for additional info. Like all plans, features may change or be discontinued at any time; see T‑Mobile Terms and Conditions at T‑Mobile.com for details. Tethering: 50GB high-speed data then unlimited on our network at max 3G speeds. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. For customers using >50GB/month., primary data usage must be on smartphone or tablet. Smartphone and tablet usage is prioritized over Mobile Hotspot Service (tethering) usage, which may result in higher speeds for data used on smartphones and tablets. AutoPay discount requires bank account or debit card, up to 8 lines, otherwise $10/month per line. May not be reflected on 1st bill. International Roaming in Simple Global Destinations: Calls, including over Wi-Fi, are $.25/minute (no charge for Wi-Fi calls to US, Mexico, and Canada). In Canada/Mexico, up to 15GB high-speed data then unlimited at up to 256kbps. In Simple Global destinations, up to 5GB high-speed data, then unlimited at up to 256 Kbps. Video typically streams at up to 2.5 Mbps (SD), where available. Not for extended international use; you must reside in the U.S. and primary usage must occur on our network. Device must register on our network before international use. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. Coverage not available in some areas; we are not responsible for our partners’ networks. Scam Shield: Capable device required. Turning on Scam Block might block calls you want; disable any time. 

Experience Beyond General Terms: $35 device connection charge due at sale. Credit approval & deposit may be required. U.S. roaming and on-network data allotments differ: includes 200MB roaming. Unlimited talk & text features for direct communications between 2 people; others (e.g., conference & chat lines, etc.) may cost extra. Unlimited high-speed data in US only. Not available for hotspots and some other data-first devices. Capable device required for some features. Activation required to deliver video streams at speeds that provide up to Ultra HD video capability (max 4K); some content providers may not stream their services in UHD. May affect speed of video downloads; does not apply to video uploads. Upgrade-ready Every Year: Available only for qualifying new financed devices purchased on Experience Beyond plan; existing devices are not eligible. Upgrade qualifying device after at least 6 months and when 50% of device cost has been paid. Trade-in device must be in good working order. You must be current with your scheduled financing and wireless service payments. Upgrading ends current financing and any device promotion or deposit reimbursement credits and we will pay the remaining balance of your then-existing finance agreement; trade-in satisfies early upgrade and not valued separately. Not combinable with some offers (e.g. JUMP). Upgrade benefit is subject to cancellation or change. Tethering: 50GB high-speed data then unlimited on our network at max 3G speeds. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. For customers using >50GB/month., primary data usage must be on smartphone or tablet. Smartphone and tablet usage is prioritized over Mobile Hotspot Service (tethering) usage, which may result in higher speeds for data used on smartphones and tablets. AutoPay Pricing for voice lines 1-8. AutoPay discount requires bank account or debit card, otherwise $10 more/line/mo. May not be reflected on first bill. International Roaming: Calls, including over Wi-Fi, are $.25/minute in 215+ countries and destinations (no charge for Wi-Fi calls to US, Mexico, and Canada). In Canada/Mexico, up to 15GB high-speed data then unlimited at up to 256kbps. In 215+ countries and destinations, up to 5GB high-speed data, then unlimited at up to 256 Kbps. Video typically streams at up to 2.5 Mbps (SD), where available. Not for extended international use; you must reside in the U.S. and primary usage must occur on our network. Device must register on our network before international use. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. Apple TV: Offer subject to change. Receive Apple TV discount (up to $9.99/month. value) while you maintain 1 qualifying Experience Beyond line in good standing. Valid only for Apple TV in the United States. Complete registration with Apple in the Apple TV app; requires iTunes/Apple Media Services account. Terms and Apple Privacy Policy apply; see the applicable terms at https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/us/terms.html. Must be 13+. Only one offer per account; may take 1-2 bill cycles. Apple TV is a registered trademark of Apple Inc. Apple is not a sponsor of this promotion. Netflix: Offer subject to change. Receive Netflix Basic (1-screen, up to $9.99/month. value) while you maintain 1 qualifying Experience Beyond line in good standing or Netflix Standard (2-screens within a household, up to $15.49/month. value) while you maintain 2+ qualifying lines in good standing. Alternative discount toward different Netflix streaming plans may apply. Not redeemable or refundable for cash. Cancel Netflix anytime. Netflix Terms of Use apply: www.netflix.com/termsofuse. 1 offer per T‑Mobile account; for existing Netflix members it may take 1-2 bill cycles during which time you will continue to be charged separately for any existing Netflix account. If you link an existing Netflix account to this offer, terminating the qualifying line(s) will not automatically cancel your Netflix membership, and Netflix will automatically resume charging your existing payment method that they have on file. See T‑Mobile.com/netflix for additional info. Like all plans, features may change or be discontinued at any time; see T‑Mobile Terms and Conditions at T‑Mobile.com for details. Coverage not available in some areas; we are not responsible for our partners’ networks. Scam Shield: Capable device required. Turning on Scam Block might block calls you want; disable any time.

$5/month. with Experience Beyond: Limited-time offer; subject to change. Postpaid only. $35 device connection charge due at sale. Credit approval & deposit may be required. $5/month. price only available with Experience Beyond; contact us prior to making plan changes or monthly price may increase. Not combinable with most offers or discounts. Data: For laptops and tablets, 30GB of high-speed data, then max 600Kbps speeds for rest of service period. For Apple wearables, Timex FamilyConnect, and SyncUP Kids Watch devices, unlimited high-speed data. For Android wearable devices, unlimited data at max 512Kbps speeds. We may notify you of approaching use thresholds via SMS; review device user manual to ensure receipt; may require third party software. See account for usage. Roaming: U.S. roaming and on-network data allotments differ; includes 200 MB roaming. Partial megabytes rounded up. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. International Roaming: Up to 5GB high-speed data in select Central European countries; otherwise standard speeds approx. 256 Kbps. Not for extended international use; you must reside in the U.S. and primary usage must occur on our network. Device must register on our network before international use. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. Coverage not available in some areas; we are not responsible for our partners’ networks. In Canada/Mexico, high-speed data up to 5GB, then unlimited at max 128Kbps. Not for extended international use; you must reside in the U.S. and primary usage must occur on our U.S. network. Communications with premium-rate numbers not included. Video streaming on capable devices at up to 2.5Mbps (SD); may affect speed of video downloads. For best performance, leave video streaming applications at default automatic resolution setting. Tethering: Available for tablet devices only; high-speed tethering counts towards overall high-speed data allotment. After allotment, tethering at max 600Kbps speeds. Network Management: Service may be slowed, suspended, terminated, or restricted for misuse, abnormal use, interference with our network or ability to provide quality service to other users, or significant roaming. On-device usage is prioritized over tethering usage, which may result in higher speeds for data used on device. See T-Mobile.com/OpenInternet for details. For use only as intended with the device type registered at activation. See Terms and Conditions (including arbitration provision) at www.T-Mobile.com for additional information.

Broadband facts

Broadband Facts Mobile Broadband Consumer Disclosure

Monthly Price

  • 1 line $90
  • 2 lines $150
  • 3 lines $185
  • 4 lines $220
  • 5 lines $255
Additional Lines
  • 6-8 Lines $35 / line
  • 9-12 Lines $40 / line

This monthly price is not an introductory rate and does not require a yearly contract.

Does not include AutoPay or other discounts.

Provider monthly fees
  • Regulatory programs / Telco recovery fee $3.99/line

  • Federal & Local Surcharges
    (periodically set by gov. & vary by location)

One-time fees
  • Device connection charge $35/line
Early termination fee $0
Government taxes Varies by location

Discounts & Bundles

There may be additional billing discounts available.

Speeds Provided with Plan

  • Typical Download Speed 89 – 418 Mbps (5G)
  • Typical Upload Speed 6 – 31 Mbps (5G)
  • Typical Latency 17 – 32 ms
Data Included with Monthly Price Unlimited
  • Charges for Additional Data Usage $0

Get it faster with store pickup

Get your order as soon as today! When reviewing your order, select Store pickup as the delivery method and we'll start preparing your order at the eligible T-Mobile store of your choice.

Accessories are currently not available for store pickup.

You'll receive an email when your order is ready for pickup and you'll get two business days to collect it.

We’re sorry—you’re not eligible for this promotion.

You can still make your purchase and take advantage of T-Mobile’s network, perks, and benefits.

More about JUMP!

JUMP! Upgrades

JUMP! is type of upgrade which allows you to simply trade in your eligible device and T-Mobile will cover your remaining device payments, for up to half the cost of your current device. JUMP! is part of Protection<360>® featuring AppleCare® Services on eligible devices in case your device is lost, accidentally damaged, stolen, or has hardware issues after the manufacturer's warranty has expired; and McAfee® Security for T-Mobile with ID Protection to secure your data.

Interested in a device promotion?

After selecting the device from your account that you want to replace or upgrade, you might be presented with a promotion providing the option to pay off your EIP (Equipment Installment Plan), and trade in your current device for credit toward a new device. If you take advantage of the promo, you will lose your JUMP! benefit. 

Get Started

Use your Yearly Upgrade and trade-in  your device.

Your Yearly Upgrade benefit requires trading in a device that is in good condition. Damaged devices are ineligible.

With Yearly Upgrade:

  • We pay off the $eipBalance remaining on your trade-in device.
  • Your trade-in also qualifies you for active promotions, if eligible.
  • Congrats! You’ve paid 50% of your trade-in device. It must be in good working condition to qualify.

View full terms , opens in a new window

What’s T-Satellite?

T-Satellite gives your phone an extra layer of coverage. In areas no carrier towers can reach, your phone will automatically connect to T-Satellite, so you can send messages (including text to 911), and share your location.

Even better? It's already included with Experience Beyond, our most value-packed. On a different plan? You can still get T-Satellite as an add-on for your line.

Learn more , opens in a new window

What’s T-Satellite?

T-Satellite gives your phone an extra layer of coverage. In areas no carrier towers can reach, your phone will automatically connect to T-Satellite, so you can send messages (including text to 911), share your location, access satellite-ready apps and more.

Even better? It's already included with Experience Beyond, our most value-packed plan. On a different plan? You can still get T-Satellite as an add-on for your line.

Learn more , opens in a new window

Decline device protection?

Without protection, you’ll pay full price on repairs or replacements and keep making payments on a financed device, even if it’s lost or stolen.

Hello! Want to stay logged in?

To keep your accounts safe, you'll be automatically logged out in: 

Share your screen while on a call or in store

Get guided support from an Expert in real time

  • For your security, personal info, tabs, and notifications are automatically hidden.
  • You can stop screen sharing at any time.
  • Experts can only see what’s on T-Mobile.com.
  • Don’t use screen share while driving or in any situation where it's unsafe to focus on your screen.

By clicking 'Accept and continue,' you are consenting to allow the Expert to view your screen for assisted navigation. This session may be recorded. To learn more, please visit the  T-Mobile Privacy Notice.

code
